text.title: reranking-diversity-mmr Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for reranking-diversity-mmr as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running MMR with embeddings from a different model than the one used for initial vector retrieval (e.g., retrieval with text-embedding-3-large, MMR diversity term with a different local embedding model).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The diversity similarity matrix is computed in the embedding space. Mixing embedding models produces similarity values on incompatible scales, making the diversity term unreliable. Use the same embedding model for both retrieval and MMR diversity computation.

failure-mode.description: Using lambda_param=0.0 (pure diversity) in a RAG pipeline where query relevance must be maintained.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pure diversity selection ignores relevance entirely. The selected documents may be maximally spread across the embedding space but none of them may actually answer the query. Keep lambda above 0.3 to maintain meaningful relevance.
